title: list images when arg of images without tag

:open_mouth:  , only works for same name and ID with different tags, :woman_facepalming:  docker even works with 

```
$ sudo docker images \*dora
REPOSITORY          TAG                 IMAGE ID            CREATED             SIZE
fedora              qi                  eb6011ebaca4        35 minutes ago      5.53MB
fedora              latest              d7372e6c93c6        6 days ago          275MB
fedora              26                  f36d549d2474        6 days ago          232MB
```
